📖 Tutorial

How to Apply Settings

Follow these steps for any device or emulator.

1

Find Your Device

Search your Android model or pick your iPhone/iPad/iMac/Emulator from the tabs above.

2

Copy Sensitivity

Click any device row or card to see full settings. Tap "Copy All" to grab all values at once.

3

Open Free Fire

Go to Home → Settings (gear icon) → Sensitivity. Enter General, Red Dot, 2x, 4x, AWM, Free Look.

4

Set Graphics

Also go to Settings → Graphics. Set Resolution, Frame Rate, and Graphics Quality as shown for your device.

5

Training Ground

Enter Training Mode. Spray a wall, test all scopes, adjust ±5 each value to match your finger speed.

6

Go Booyah!

Play ranked, lock in your settings, and dominate. Re-check every update in case FF changes sensitivity.
